backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing article management (admin-only add), user bookmarking with authentication checks, user profile CRUD operations, and integration with AccessControl and Storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features (news feed, category navigation, article detail view, bookmarking, and search) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components including routing, authentication, article display, search, bookmarks, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, borders, and component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Blinkt Mobile Clone application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, article detail, bookmarks, and search pages, plus profile setup modal and theme provider integration.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright year, heart icon, and attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky header with logo, search bar, bookmarks button, login button, and responsive mobile menu using Sheet component for navigation.
frontend/src/components/ArticleCard.tsx: Card component rendering article thumbnail, title, source, timestamp with relative formatting, and bookmark button with hover effects and navigation to detail page.
frontend/src/components/BookmarkButton.t: Toggle button for bookmarking articles with authentication check, mutation handling, optimistic UI updates, and toast notifications for errors.
frontend/src/components/CategoryTabs.tsx: Renders a horizontal tab list for filtering articles by category (All, Technology, Business, Sports, Entertainment, General). Uses shadcn/ui Tabs component with custom styling for active states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main application layout structure with a header, footer, and main content area using flexbox for full-height layout.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a login/logout button that manages Internet Identity authentication, handles login errors, and clears the query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NewsFeed.tsx: Displays an infinite-scrolling list of articles with loading skeletons and error states. Uses intersection observer to trigger pagination and switches between all articles or category-filtered queries.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users to enter their name for profile setup. Cannot be dismissed until submitted.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input form that navigates to the search page with query parameters when submitted.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking. Handles delegation identity validation and AuthClient configuration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, articles (with pagination and category filtering), bookmarks, and search functionality with optimistic updates.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using a vibrant teal accent color scheme for a news application.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/ArticleDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single article with thumbnail, title, metadata, snippet, and a link to read the full article externally. Includes back navigation and bookmark functionality.
frontend/src/pages/BookmarksPage.tsx: Shows a list of user's bookmarked articles with authentication check. Displays empty state when no bookmarks exist and provides navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page that renders category tabs for filtering and a news feed component displaying articles based on selected category.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Displays search results for articles based on query parameter from URL. Shows empty states for no query or no results, with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extending colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features (news feed, categories, article details, bookmarks, search, UI design) and pending backend data model implementation for the Blinkt Mobile clone.
